quail-with-stew-flavors-teleculinaria.name: Quail With Stew Flavors
instructions: Corte as codornizes ao meio e tempere-as com sal, pimenta, o vinho branco e os alhos laminados.
Limpe e corte os pimentos em tiras; descasque e corte as cebolas em meias-luas; corte os tomates em cubos.
Num tacho, coloque primeiro o tomate, seguido da cebola e dos pimentos. Por fim, disponha as codornizes e acrescente a sua marinada.
Regue com o azeite, tape e leve a lume brando, deixando cozinhar lentamente. Quase no final, acrescente os coentros, retifique os temperos de sal e pimenta e deixe apurar. Sirva de seguida.

quinoa-burgers-recipe-comedera.name: Quinoa Burgers Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cda de harina de avena o almendras

instructions: Inicia la receta, poniendo la quinoa en un bol.
Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla hasta integrar muy bien.
Then add oregano, garlic powder, paprika and onion powder. Mix and make sure that everything's well integrated.
Ahora, bate los huevos con una batidora o manualmente hasta que suban un poco.
Incorporates eggs into the mixture and adds oatmeal or almonds. Mix with a spatula till everything's quite well mixed.
Your mass should be compact but very manageable. If you see she's a little steamed up, add more flour.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil.
Fold your hands and get a portion of the mix and make a little ball. Then she crashes and forms a burger.
Cooking for 7 minutes from each side with medium heat or till they are golden.
When ready put them on a plate with absorbing paper and ready.
